prompt: 帮我写一段 15 秒的视频提示词，使用时间戳分镜法：一只橘猫从沙发上醒来，伸懒腰，然后跳到窗台上看窗外的雨。竖屏 9:16，治愈风格。格式示例：0-3秒：[画面 + 镜头]；4-8秒：[画面 + 镜头]...

assertions.name: multiple_versions
assertions.check: response.md contains '版本一', '版本二', and optionally '版本三' sections

assertions.name: timestamp_structure
assertions.check: response.md contains time segments like '0-3秒', '4-8秒', etc.

assertions.name: sound_effects
assertions.check: response.md mentions sound/音效/雨声/呼噜声

assertions.name: atmosphere_descriptions
assertions.check: response.md describes atmosphere like '治愈', '温馨', '日系'

assertions.name: no_multimodal_refs
assertions.description: Does not reference @图片 or @视频 (pure text)
assertions.check: response.md does not contain '@图片' or '@视频'

assertions.name: quality_checklist
assertions.check: response.md contains '质量自检' section with checkboxes

assertions.name: forbidden_items
assertions.check: response.md contains '禁止' statement about text/subtitles/logos
